comments.author: @iainwhitehouse
comments.text: Beautiful scenery. Pity some of the animals depicted are Northern hemispere and definitely are not found in South Africa. The narrative was not synced with the imagery. Video shows Bourkes Luck Potholes whilst narrator is talking about God's Window and he is happily discussing the 3 Rondawels whicj only appeared a minute later and it was not even a clear shotof them. comments.author: @elmon38
comments.text: South Africa has one Capital, Pretoria. Bloemfontein is not a capital of anything. The highest court in South Africa is in Johannesburg. The national legislature is in Cape Town. There are provincial legislatures though. We have one Capital, Pretoria.

Beautiful video of scenery but couldn't take another second of the mispronunciations. Truly cringe worthy. We get that it's Ai and do expect the odd thing but this was insane. Feel sorry for anyone that hasn't been here before trying to book their holidays, they'll never end up in the right place.

Why don't you just use your voice for the narrative. Eish!!!
